mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (name, gender, phone, level, status) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(real_name, ''), username), NULL, NULL, role, 'normal' FROM users u LEFT JOIN (SELECT name FROM members) m ON m.name = COALESCE(NULLIF(u.real_name, ''), u.username) WHERE m.name IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, gender, phone, level, status FROM members ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (name, gender, phone, level, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{level}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, level = #{level}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
